name: Lesco
description_short: Lesco Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Westmoreland County residents with savings accounts, loans, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Lesco Federal Credit Union (Lesco FCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union that serves individuals living or working in Westmoreland County. The institution is NCUA-insured and operates as a community-focused financial cooperative. Membership requires opening a share savings account with a minimum $25 deposit that must remain in the account at all times. Lesco positions itself as offering financial products with minimal fees and low minimum balance requirements compared to traditional banks.

Lesco offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial services including share savings accounts, Christmas Club savings, vehicle loans (new and used), credit cards, online banking, mobile banking with check deposit capability, bill pay, e-statements, and audio banking. Their current auto loan rates range from 4.99% APR for new vehicles and 5.75% APR for used vehicles, with potential rate reductions to 5.74% through relationship pricing discounts. Credit cards are offered at a standard rate of 10.90% APR. The credit union also provides CardHub for enhanced debit and credit card management with security alerts and spending insights.

Lesco distinguishes itself through digital-first convenience features including a recently updated mobile app (version 8.0.19 iOS/4.16.2 Android) with digital wallet integration for instant card access, one-click transfer capabilities, and mobile check deposit with same-day processing capability. The institution emphasizes member control and transparency through real-time transaction visibility and multiple access channels. They also offer $3,000 Group AD&D (accidental death and dismemberment) benefits at no cost to members.

Lesco's primary limitation is its strict geographic membership requirement—eligibility is restricted to those living or working in Westmoreland County, which significantly narrows the potential member base. The credit union's website provides limited detail on specific account features, fee structures, or product eligibility requirements. Membership also requires maintaining the $25 minimum deposit indefinitely, creating a permanent account opening cost.
services: Share savings accounts with $25 minimum opening deposit
Vehicle loans (new and used) with APR rates starting at 4.99%
Credit cards with standard APR of 10.90%
Online banking with real-time transaction viewing and inter-account transfers
Mobile banking app with check deposit, fund transfers, and bill pay management
Mobile check deposit up to 5 checks per day with $4,000 per-check maximum
Bill pay with payment tracking and payee management
E-statements available for download and printing
Christmas Club savings account with no minimum balance requirement
CardHub card management dashboard with security alerts and spending insights
Group AD&D insurance benefits at no cost to members
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 4.99% APR for new vehicles and 5.75% for used vehicles with available relationship pricing discounts
Digital wallet integration and instant card issuance available in mobile app with latest updates
Mobile check deposit feature allows checks up to $4,000 each with same-day processing capability
One-click transfers between accounts and comprehensive bill pay system with payment tracking
No-cost $3,000 Group AD&D benefits included for all members
E-statements and audio banking options for account management flexibility
CardHub dashboard provides centralized debit and credit card management with security alerts and spending insights
cons: Membership is strictly limited to Westmoreland County residents or employees, eliminating access for others
Requires permanent $25 minimum balance in share savings account that cannot be withdrawn
Limited product information on website regarding specific fees, account features, and eligibility requirements
Mobile check deposit limited to 5 checks per day with $4,000 per-check cap
Website provides minimal details on savings account rates, CD terms, or specific credit card rewards programs
best_for: Westmoreland County residents seeking low-cost vehicle financing with competitive APR rates
Digital-native members who prefer mobile banking and want real-time transaction visibility
Individuals looking for a community-focused credit union with minimal fees and low minimum balances
Members interested in combined account products eligible for relationship pricing discounts
diagnosis: Lesco FCU is best for Westmoreland County residents seeking a community-focused credit union with low-cost loans and digital banking convenience. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership eligibility—out-of-area individuals cannot join regardless of the institution's product quality.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
